creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: wg
Date: Wed Jun 18 18:09:41 UTC 2014
New revision: 358296
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/358296

Log:
  sysutils/froxlor: minor fixes

  - Add WANT_PHP_CLI, since froxlor cron jobs rely on the cli sapi
  - Add WANT_PHP_MOD due to separation of Apache PHP5 module
  - Use WWWGRP/WWWOWN in pkg-plist
  - Add option for depending on dns/bind99
  - Remove superfluous NEED_ROOT
  - Bump PORTREVISION

  PR:		191102
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Changes:
  head/sysutils/froxlor/Makefile
  head/sysutils/froxlor/pkg-plist
